sql.query: UPDATE tbl_tasks SET taskName=:taskName,description=:description,status=:status,priority=:priority,isRequired=:isRequired,assignedToUserId=CASE WHEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(:assignment1,':',1)='user' THEN CAST(NULLIF(SUBSTRING_INDEX(:assignment2,':',-1),'') AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END,assignedToTeamId=CASE WHEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(:assignment3,':',1)='team' THEN CAST(NULLIF(SUBSTRING_INDEX(:assignment4,':',-1),'') AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END,assignedToRoleId=CASE WHEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(:assignment5,':',1)='role' THEN CAST(NULLIF(SUBSTRING_INDEX(:assignment6,':',-1),'') AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END,dueDate=NULLIF(:dueDate,''),startedDate=CASE WHEN :status2='in_progress' THEN COALESCE(startedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE startedDate END,completedDate=CASE WHEN :status3='complete' THEN COALESCE(completedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE NULL END,completedByUserId=CASE WHEN :status4='complete' THEN :userId ELSE NULL END,modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=:id AND tenantId=:tenantId
